translations.en: Phoenix
translations.zh: 鳳凰

translations.en: a graceful, silver haired woman in robes of blue.
translations.zh: 一位優雅、銀髮飄逸、身著藍袍的女子。

translations.en: She eyes you suspiciously. "What do you want?"
translations.zh: 她狐疑地打量著汝。「汝要什麼？」

translations.en: "I am Phoenix."
translations.zh: 「吾乃鳳凰。」

translations.en: "I used to be captain of the Black @Thechu."
translations.zh: 「吾昔日曾任黑色@Thechu（特初）號的船長。」

translations.en: "But now I'm a member of the @thieves @guild, and I don't care who knows it."
translations.zh: 「但吾如今是@thieves（盜賊）@guild（公會）的成員，吾不在乎誰知道。」

translations.en: "Britain is the wealthiest city in the world, and I make a tidy living sneaking up there at night to 'liberate' a few possessions."
translations.zh: 「不列顛城是世上最富有的城市，吾靠著夜間潛入那裡『解放』一些財物維持不錯的生計。」

translations.en: "Of course, I only steal from those who have too much wealth for their own good."
translations.zh: 「當然，吾只取那些積財過甚之人的一二物。」

translations.en: "It's an honorable profession, with as long a tradition as any other."
translations.zh: 「此乃光榮之業，傳統悠久，不亞於任何行當。」

translations.en: "She was the finest ship that ever sailed. But those days are past."
translations.zh: 「她是曾在海上航行過最出色的船。但那些日子已成過去。」

translations.en: "The crew's scattered to the four corners of the earth, and the Thechu's off amongst the @stars."
translations.zh: 「船員四散天涯，特初號已漂入繁@stars（星）之間。」

translations.en: "We were at port one day when the anchor chain snapped, and the Thechu drifted off the @edge of the world."
translations.zh: 「有一日吾等停靠在港口，錨鏈驟然斷裂，特初號便漂出了世界的@edge（邊緣）。」

translations.en: "I'd join her if I could, and sail through space..."
translations.zh: 「若能如此，吾真想隨她而去，在星海中遨遊……」

translations.en: "The world is flat, you know." She eyes you appraisingly.
translations.zh: 「汝知道嗎，世界是平的。」她打量著汝。

translations.en: "Surely any well educated person would be aware of that."
translations.zh: 「任何受過良好教育之人皆應曉得此理。」

translations.en: "You want my belt? I'm sorry,
translations.zh: 「汝要吾的腰帶？抱歉，
translations.note: 前半，接 lass 或 laddy

translations.en: laddy
translations.zh: 小夥子，

translations.en: lass
translations.zh: 姑娘，

translations.en: , but I'm not ready to @retire just yet."
translations.zh: 吾尚未準備好@retire（退休）。」

translations.en: "No way! I'm making too good a living to give it up now."
translations.zh: 「不行！吾現在賺得正好，豈有放棄之理。」

translations.en: "If you want to get my belt, use your @wits. Prove you're worthy to replace me."
translations.zh: 「若想得吾的腰帶，就用汝的@wits（機智）。證明汝有資格取代吾。」

translations.en: "Figure it out yourself."
translations.zh: 「自己想辦法。」

translations.en: "If you want to join the guild, go talk to @Budo about it."
translations.zh: 「若想加入公會，去找@Budo（布多）談談。」

translations.en: "He lives in Buccaneer's @Den."
translations.zh: 「他住在海盜@Den（巢穴）。」

translations.en: "These tunnels can take you there - unless you get lost, or the rats get you..."
translations.zh: 「這些地道可帶汝過去——除非汝迷了路，或被老鼠解決了……」

translations.en: "The rumors of @pirates there are just idle @chatter."
translations.zh: 「那邊有@pirates（海盜）的傳言不過是些閒@chatter（話）。」

translations.en: She smiles. "I haven't been there in a while. It's a lovely little town..."
translations.zh: 她微微一笑。「吾好一陣子沒去了。那是個可愛的小城……」

translations.en: "I don't know about you, but some of us have more important things to do with our time."
translations.zh: 「吾不知汝怎麼想，但吾等有些人還有更重要的事要做。」

translations.en: "Pirates? I'm sure I wouldn't know a thing about them."
translations.zh: 「海盜？吾可不認識任何海盜。」

translations.en: "About time you were on your way. One thing before you go..." She draws her dagger.
translations.zh: 「汝也該上路了。走之前有一件事……」她拔出匕首。

translations.en: "Don't tell anyone where my hideout is. If you do, some night you'll go to sleep and never wake up again."
translations.zh: 「不准告訴任何人吾藏身處在哪。若是說了，某日夜裡汝睡著就再也醒不來了。」

translations.en: "You'll never know when it's coming."
translations.zh: 「汝永遠不知道那一刻何時到來。」

translations.en: *She turns and throws the dagger at a little mouse that was sniffing around for food, pinning it to the wall by its tail.
translations.zh: *她轉身將匕首擲向一隻正在嗅食物的小老鼠，將牠的尾巴釘在牆上。

translations.en: "Eeeeek!" Sherry runs up your leg, and it takes several minutes before you can coax her back down again.
translations.zh: 「吱吱吱！」雪莉沿著你的腿往上竄，你費了好幾分鐘才把她哄下來。
translations.note: 旁白，雪莉為隊伍中的老鼠

translations.en: "I haven't got all day to stand around talking. Get to the point, or go bother someone else."
translations.zh: 「吾沒有整天時間站在這裡說話。說重點，否則去煩別人。」

translator_notes: 鳳凰是銀髮前船長兼盜賊公會成員，語氣冷峻強悍，帶自信的諷刺感。黑色特初號錨鏈斷裂漂出世界邊緣一幕是本作設定中「世界是平的」的具體呈現。離場時的匕首示威（射中雪莉老鼠的尾巴）是全遊戲最具衝擊性的場景之一。laddy/lass 依玩家性別分版本。
